name: @acme-skunkworks/shared-workflows
description: Reusable GitHub Actions workflows shared across the Acme Skunkworks estate.

**/*.{yml,yaml}: bash -c 'if command -v yamllint >/dev/null 2>&1; then yamllint "$@"; elif [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then echo "⚠️  yamllint not installed — skipping. Install with: brew install yamllint"; else echo "⚠️  yamllint not installed — skipping. Install with: pip install --user yamllint==1.37.1"; fi' --
.github/workflows/*.{yml,yaml}: bash -c 'if command -v actionlint >/dev/null 2>&1; then actionlint "$@"; elif [ "$(uname -s)" = "Darwin" ]; then echo "⚠️  actionlint not installed — skipping. Install with: brew install actionlint"; else echo "⚠️  actionlint not installed — skipping. Install via: bash <(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rhysd/actionlint/v1.7.12/scripts/download-actionlint.bash)"; fi' --
